RED.effect: Winning the Small Blind gives no money. Big and Boss Blinds still pay.

GREEN.effect: Required score scales faster with Ante (stacks with Red Stake).

BLACK.effect: Shop Jokers have a 30% chance of having an Eternal sticker (cannot be sold or destroyed).

BLUE.effect: -1 discard per round (stacks with previous stakes).

PURPLE.effect: Required score scales faster (stacks with previous stakes).

ORANGE.effect: Perishable Jokers can appear in the shop (self-destruct after a set number of rounds).

GOLD.effect: Rental Jokers can appear in the shop (costs $1 per round).
